meaning: n.混合物,[化]化合物adj.复合的v.混合,配合
examples: Common salt is a compound of sodium and chlorine.
A compound sentence contains two or more clauses.
Honey is basically a compound of water, two types of sugar, vitamins and enzymes.
In a moment, well give a hint about the compound arithmetic that makes this so.
To compound this misdiagnosis, The Economist proffers medicine that would do more harm than good.
